description: Test-coverage policy. Filters the ideal matrix produced by coverage-analyzer.mts. This is NOT runtime configuration — it only shapes which (base, addon-combo, task) cells the analyzer enumerates and reports as gaps.

addon-acme.description: ACME only matters in nginx (only consumer). Test solo, never in combinations.

samba-shares.description: Samba addon currently unused — exclude from the matrix until adoption.

oci-image.description: Framework — never deployed standalone. Apps that extend it (gitea, postgres, …) emit their own cells under base:oci-image.

docker-compose.description: Framework — never deployed standalone. Apps that extend it (docker-registry-mirror, postgrest, …) emit their own cells under base:docker-compose.

proxmox.description: Host-only app (hidden, reconfigure-only). Two realistic deployments: SSL-only and SSL+OIDC. SSL-only also covers the base:none/ssl/reconfigure cell since proxmox is the sole base:none app left after frameworks are excluded.

npm-nodejs.description: Deprecated framework — no live tests planned. Pending full removal from json/applications and json/frameworks.

skipCells.description: docker-compose with no addons reconfigured to no addons is a no-op — not a realistic deployment pattern. nginx/reconf-addons-off already covers the analogous oci-image cell.
